identity.name: Realtouch Invoice
identity.aesthetic: Paper & Ink (Digital Brutalism meets Swiss Utility)
principles: Fusion: Accounting precision mixed with architectural spacing
Tangibility: Documents should feel like physical paper on a screen
Clarity: Data over decoration. Space Mono for numbers is non-negotiable
Contrast: Sharp black ink against soft paper whites

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6, Data Values, Pricing, and Invoice Numbers. Gives a 'receipt' aesthetic.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, inputs, and UI text.

secondary.description: Success Green - used for 'Paid' status and positive financial metrics

usage_rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Primary Blue (#0066cc) is for Actions (Buttons, Links) and Active States.
Green is strictly for Financial Success (Paid, Income).
Red is for Errors and Overdue Invoices.
Backgrounds should be Slate-50 (#F8FAFC) to reduce eye strain, with Cards being White (#FFFFFF).

spacing_system.base: Use 2x standard spacing. If you think p-4 is enough, use p-8.

marketing.rules: Asymmetry is key. Use col-span-8 for hero visuals, col-span-4 for supporting text.

dashboard.rules: Dense but distinct. Use 'Grid Borders' strategy (borders between items).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0066cc] text-white hover:bg-[#0052a3] rounded-md px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-[#0066cc] hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.invoice_preview: bg-white shadow-xl border border-slate-100 rounded-sm aspect-[1/1.414] (A4 ratio) transform hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0066cc]/20 focus:border-[#0066cc] transition-all font-outfit

status_badges.paid: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase
status_badges.pending: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase
status_badges.overdue: bg-red-100 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase

textures.sidebar: Use a subtle noise texture overlay on the dark sidebar if possible, or a very subtle gradient from Slate-900 to Slate-800.

hero_bg.usage: Hero Section Background with heavy white overlay (90% opacity) to ensure text readability.

team_collaboration.usage: About/Features section to show human element.

context_feature.usage: Features section background or side image.

landing_page: Hero: Split layout. Left = Value Prop. Right = 3D-tilted Invoice Card (CSS transform) floating.
Features: Use Bento Grid. Do not use standard 3-col layout.
Pricing: Highlight 'Pro' tier with a 'Tracing Beam' border effect (blue gradient border).
Testimonials: Use a horizontal scroll marquee.

dashboard.sidebar: Dark mode sidebar (Slate-900). Navigation links should be white/gray. Active link = Blue bg + White text.
dashboard.download_limit: MUST be prominent in the sidebar. Use a progress bar: '2/5 Free Downloads Used'. Color turns red at 5/5.
dashboard.invoice_editor: The editor container must look like a physical A4 paper centered on a gray background. Use 'shadow-xl'.

invoice_design.table: Striped rows (slate-50/white). Right-align numbers. Font-mono for all currency values.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
